name: Ginger Wine
recipeInstructions:
D.C. sugar may stand for Demerara Cane sugar. I assume it just means white
sugar. Or it may refer to another type of sugar that is available in
Guyana which looks like US table sugar but is brown (it is not like the
moist brown sugar that we use in the US).
1. Crush ginger and put into a jar.
2. Add all other ingredients and leave for 21 days.
3. Strain and bottle.
